# Precision Frontend Engineering

> Frontend development done right. Pixel-perfect builds, polished interactions, clean code.

## About

Precision Frontend Engineering specializes in high-quality frontend development—design-to-code builds, interactive UI, animations, dashboards, CMS theming, and complex integrations.

## Services

- Site Building: Full builds from design to launch, pixel-perfect implementation
- Interactive Elements: Forms, filters, dynamic UI, multi-step flows
- Animation & Effects: Micro-interactions, scroll effects, state transitions
- Dashboards & Data: Admin panels, charts, reporting interfaces
- CMS Theming: WordPress, headless CMS, custom theme development
- Form Integrations: Validation logic, third-party APIs, connected systems
- Tracking & Analytics: Custom event tracking, goal conversions, analytics setup

## Tech Stack

Vue, Svelte, TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Tailwind, Vercel, OpenAI, Anthropic

## Projects

- Spend Analyzer: https://spend-analyzer.precisionfrontend.com
  A micro SaaS tool for understanding spending patterns with CSV import and interactive charts.

- ReadableJS: https://readableJS.precisionfrontend.com
  A developer tool that analyzes JavaScript code for readability and maintainability.

- QR Holo: https://holo-qr.vercel.app
  Generate QR codes with holographic visual effects.

- (Add)ictive Programming: https://addictiveprogramming.com
  Technical blog covering web development, AI integration, and mental health in tech.
